negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_122
prompt: The video opens with a first-person view of a robot seated at a white table in a laboratory or workshop setting. A large, open rectangular cardboard box filled with various items, including cables, small containers, and possibly tools, sits prominently on the table. To the right of the box lies a clear plastic bag containing an object that resembles a small electronic device or component. The robotic arm is positioned near the bag, suggesting they are about to interact with it. A person wearing yellow shoes is standing next to the left of the robot. The background reveals a clean, well-lit environment with several workstations equipped with computers and office chairs, indicating a professional workspace. The floor is a polished gray, reflecting the overhead lights, contributing to the clinical and organized atmosphere.  As the video progresses, the robotic arm reaches towards the clear plastic bag on the table. Initially, the bag is lying flat, but as the arm approaches, it begins to lift slightly, indicating the intention to pick up or manipulate the contents inside. The right robotic arm then grasps the bag firmly, lifting it off the table, suggesting the start of an action to either examine its contents more closely or place it elsewhere. By the final frame, the right robotic arm has lifted the plastic bag, which now appears to be held above the table, with the contents partially visible. The robotic arm then places the plastic bag into the box, which remains on the table. The surrounding environment, including the workstations and the polished floor, remains unchanged, maintaining the professional and organized setting established in the initial frames.
